meta.title: Gabriel Arroyo | Front-End
meta.description: Gabriel Arroyo — front-end developer. React, TypeScript, and product-focused interfaces.

name: Gabriel Arroyo
bio: I build resilient, fast interfaces focused on product experience — mainly with React and TypeScript.
I don’t stop at translating layouts. I understand business requirements, model client-side data, and ship clean, typed, production-ready code.

projects.title: Arkhiveon
projects.description: Realtime collaborative SaaS for RPG campaigns — multi-user sync, complex state, and RLS.

projects.title: Modular design system
projects.description: Typed, accessible component library with design tokens and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: High-performance dashboards
projects.description: Dense REST-backed interfaces with lazy loading and fine-grained render control.
